name: mlb-alert-telegram-agent
description: Telegram bot for concise MLB pre-game alerts with win probability.

scripts.setup: npm run setup:python && npm run setup:web
scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/dashboard.js && node --check dashboard/app.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/telegram.js && node --check src/mlb.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check src/llm.js && node --check src/analystSkill.js && node --check src/utils.js
